title: Building a Simple Compiler Backend

content:
Hello, I am Artin, and… # I’m currently a CSE (Computer Science & Engineering) Bachelor’s student at Shiraz University.
This is our university, placed on a mountain. Computer Science is my primary passion, but I am also drawn to natural sciences (specially Biology), History, and Linguistics. If I find some free time, I make sure to study about these topics, and share interesting things I find on here.
My current focus # Currently, I am focused on 2 areas:
Code Generation using LLMs; Computer Vision applications in Medical Engineering. My Hobbies # Other than those interests, I like:
Anime & Light Novels: Who doesn’t like a well-written story? Learning Languages: I like studying Japanese and German languages. 日本語が好き. Und ich mag Deutsch. Playing Games: Still stuck in “Age of Empires: Rise of Roman Empire”. I like being Hannibal the most. Music: All kinds of it, Japanese pop, roch, metal, German metal. I hope you explore my website and find what I share interesting.
title: About
